sources.title: The Murder Mansion 1972
sources.description: A couple lost in thick fog take refuge in an old mansion next to a cemetery, where strange things start to happen.

metadata.Plot: Group of people take refuge in a mansion situated in the middle of nowhere and that too situated next to a cemetery which is always foggy. Slowly one by one is murdered and few survivors claim to witness a witch and a bulky zombie lurking in the cemetery.
metadata.Writer: Luis G. de Blain, Antonio Troiso
metadata.Actors: Analía Gadé, Ida Galli, Andrés Resino
